description.value: You temporarily overcome one harmful condition. This does not end the effect causing the condition; it just suspends that conditionâs effect for the duration of the spell. You can surmount any one of the following conditions: blinded, confused, dazed, dazzled, deafened, fatigued, frightened, paralyzed, shaken, or sickened.
